generated_oml:
instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building in the architecture, engineering, construction and operations (AECO) domain, serving as a cyber-physical asset for simulation, analysis, and optimization through integration of static models and runtime data."
    base:contains DTFramework
]

instance DTFramework : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture coordinating multiple digital twin instances through modular components and standardized extension points."
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Device modeling within BIM environment defines sensors, actuators, and controllers with a unified semantic foundation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles extract structured representations from enriched BIM models to generate deployable Digital Twin artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModularArchitectureEnabler
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Framework's modular architecture for integrating custom services and analytics to adapt to operational changes."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, DecisionSupportService
]

instance BIMDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Structured data from BIM model for digital twin artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BIMModel
]

instance BIMData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured representations extracted from enriched BIM models for deployable DT artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModularArchitectureEnabler
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for infrastructure management in the AECO domain."
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentStateInsight, SystemHealthInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for infrastructure management in the AECO domain."
    DTDFVocab:provides FailurePredictionInsight, MaintenanceRecommendationInsight
]

instance DecisionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Decision-making support service for infrastructure management in the AECO domain."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationRecommendationAction, ResourceAllocationAction
]

instance CurrentStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current operational state of building systems for monitoring purposes."
]

instance SystemHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Health status of building infrastructure components."
]

instance FailurePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted potential failures in building systems."
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended maintenance actions based on analytics."
]

instance OptimizationRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for resource allocation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ResourceAllocationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Actions for efficient resource allocation in building operations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts, enabling immediate reflection of physical state changes for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT system employs a centralized architecture where the DT Framework acts as a hub, coordinating roles including Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers to facilitate bidirectional data exchange and holistic building lifecycle management through modular service integration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises initial device modeling within BIM environments to define sensors, actuators, and controllers; Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to generate deployable artifacts; real-time data exchange for synchronization; interactive visualization for monitoring and control; and modular architecture with standardized extension points enabling evolution through custom services and analytics."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points enable interoperable integration of custom services and analytics, though no specific industry standards, specifications, or certification requirements are referenced in the provided documents."
]
